{{Infobox character
| name = Sword Disciple
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Disciple]] is a young girl who has killed six [[Irons]] and incapacitated nearly forty others.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Disciple]] is a girl.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Disciple]] is potentially the disciple of a [[Gold stage]] expert.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
